templates.name: Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA)
templates.description: A bilateral or unilateral agreement to protect confidential information shared between parties.

templates.name: Employment Contract
templates.description: A standard employment agreement between an employer and a full-time or part-time employee.

templates.name: Service Agreement
templates.description: A contract between a service provider and a client defining the scope, payment, and terms of services to be rendered.

templates.name: Freelance / Independent Contractor Agreement
templates.description: A contract for engaging a freelancer or independent contractor for a specific project or ongoing work.

templates.name: Residential Lease Agreement
templates.description: A standard rental agreement between a landlord and tenant for a residential property.

templates.name: Business Partnership Agreement
templates.description: A legal agreement establishing a business partnership, defining the roles, contributions, profit sharing, and responsibilities of each partner.

templates.name: Software License Agreement (EULA)
templates.description: An End User License Agreement governing the use of software by end users.

templates.name: Sales Contract / Purchase Agreement
templates.description: A contract governing the sale and purchase of goods between a seller and a buyer.
